text.p: I will like to use this medium to tender my unreserved apology for my failure to have written you before now.
I also express my profound and immeasurable gratitude to you for your untiring help to me from the time immemorial. I sincerely thank you for your guidance during the selection of my thesis title.

Sir, I will like to inform you that I'm working on the thesis title you guided me to choose-''Interrogative Forms in English-medium Christian Charismatic Preachers' Discourse in South-Western Nigeria''. It is only that it was restructured during the presentation as-''Interpersonal Meaning in the use of English by selected Pentecostal preachers in , state''.

Sir, I wish you and your entire family members divine health, protection and help all the time. I equally wish you journey mercies, happy stay abroad and happy return to Nigeria whenever you decide to return to Nigeria.
